summary: Frontend UI testing for Mira page scrolling/input bar positioning fixes. CSS fixes verified on both Desktop (1920x900) and Mobile (390x844 iPhone 14 Pro). Input bar is properly visible and not hidden under OS taskbars/iOS home bar.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS fixes in mira-prod.css line 543-573 add proper bottom padding for .mp-composer with desktop-specific adjustments
Mobile responsive CSS at line 338-378 adds extra bottom padding for mobile browsers' UI
Safe area insets at line 2353-2371 properly handle iPhone X+ notched devices using env(safe-area-inset-bottom)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All input bar positioning tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: CSS fixes for input bar positioning have been verified. Desktop (1920x900): input bar 31px from bottom. Mobile iPhone 14 Pro (390x844): input bar 29px from bottom - proper spacing for iOS safe areas. Navigation tabs are clickable on both viewports. Content scrolling works without going behind the fixed input bar.

features_verified.login_flow: PASS - Login works and redirects to /pet-home correctly
features_verified.desktop_input_bar_visible: PASS - Input bar at 819px top, 31px from viewport bottom (1920x900)
features_verified.mobile_input_bar_visible: PASS - Input bar at 765px top, 29px from viewport bottom (390x844)
features_verified.mobile_ios_safe_area: PASS - 29px bottom spacing provides proper clearance for iOS home bar
features_verified.content_scrolling: PASS - Content scrolls properly without going behind fixed input bar
features_verified.navigation_tabs_clickable: PASS - TODAY, PICKS, SERVICES, LEARN, CONCIERGE tabs are clickable
features_verified.input_bar_accepts_text: PASS - Input bar is focusable and accepts text input on mobile

css_fixes_verified: .mp-composer padding-bottom: calc(var(--space-2xl) + 16px) for desktop taskbar clearance
@supports (padding: env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) for iPhone X+ safe area handling
